title: Yesterday
why_this_song: Yesterday by The Beatles (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Suddenly, I'm not half the man I used to be
There's a shadow hanging over me
Yesterday, love was such an easy game to play

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yesterday" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yesterday" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Yesterday, all my troubles seemed so far away
I don't know, she wouldn't say

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now I need a place to hide away

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Yesterday" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Yesterday" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Yesterday" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Yesterday", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Yesterday" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Yesterday" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Yesterday" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Yesterday" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
